candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label; identical values to Total Revenue and appears first as the reported sales line.
Also a valid total revenue label with identical values to Turnover; useful as alternate label across periods.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Financial income, not sales revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Incl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Bottom-line earnings, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.

variables.notes: Use as priority list, not sum. Turnover and Total Revenue are identical top-line labels.

candidates.why: Best match for direct operating input costs / cost of sales.
Possible COGS-style label, but empty and less clearly the reported primary line here.

variables.notes: Selected the main direct cost line above operating profit.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A/overhead component.
Semantically an overhead bucket and preferred over total if present, even if preview values are empty.
R&D line exists but appears in supplemental section below EBIT; do not include in SG&A to avoid misclassification.
Dedicated R&D supplemental disclosure below EBIT; not appropriate for SG&A bucket selection here.
Explicit SG&A label exists and should be included per rule even if preview is empty.
Balance sheet asset, not expense.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists but appears empty in preview, so included it plus closest overhead buckets for coverage across years. Excluded total rows such as Other Operating Expenses, Total and Total Operating Expense.

candidates.why: Amortization of prior R&D, not current R&D expense.
Dedicated R&D label, but preview is empty and appears in supplemental section below EBIT.
Dedicated R&D expense disclosure with values; appears in supplemental section below EBIT.
Capitalized asset, not period R&D expense.
Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Using priority list of dedicated R&D labels. These appear in the supplemental/below-EBIT area, so they were not also added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Best recurring financing cost line; appears to already aggregate lease interest plus other interest components.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring interest component, but likely already included in Interest Expense; selecting both would risk double counting.
Broader finance expense bucket that may include non-interest items; less preferred than direct interest line.
Empty and broader than pure interest.
Earnings attribution, not interest expense.
Earnings attribution, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental version of lease interest; would double count with Interest Expense.
Liability balance, not expense.
Equity attribution, not interest expense.

variables.notes: Chose the direct interest expense line only to avoid double counting underlying lease-interest components.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Income statement flow, not balance sheet equity stock.
Not shareholders' equity.
Exact concept but preview empty; weaker than populated Total Equity.
Best populated equity line; numeric relation shows it excludes Minority Interest because adding Minority Interest reconciles to Rep Total Equity & Minority Interest.
Includes minority interest, so not appropriate for BE when MIB is separately mapped.

variables.notes: Priority list. Total Equity is preferred because it appears to exclude Minority Interest; Shareholders' Equity retained as alternate label across years.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution flow, not balance sheet minority equity stock.
Income statement attribution flow, not balance sheet minority equity stock.
Direct balance sheet non-controlling interest line.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income flow, not minority equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Not minority interest balance.
Combined equity total, not minority interest alone.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet minority interest line so BE + MIB can reconstruct total equity including non-controlling interests without double counting.
